title: Ordinance Enacting the Supplemental Budget for the Year 2022 in the Amount of One Million Pesos and 00/100 ( P 1,000,000.00) Chargeable Against the General Fund Realignment From the General Services Office in Particular for Security Services to the Office of the Mayor - Public Safety Office to Defray Expenses for the Operationalization of Municipal Peace and Order (TANODS) Task Force. (AUTHOR :COUNCILOR JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 8/15/2022)
